name: Dependent Care Assistance Program Exclusion

eligibility.description: The assistance must be provided under a written plan by the employer and cannot exceed the employee's (or spouse's) earned income. The 2025 limit is $7,500 per year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees can exclude from gross income up to $7,500 ($3,750 if married filing separately) paid by their employer for child or dependent care services necessary for the employee to work.
